tracks.name: Main Theme / Long Running Music Track

audio_identity.overall_style: fast-paced arcade shooter soundtrack with effective sound design
distinctive_elements: rapid-fire animation coupled with effective sound

sources_used: Wikipedia - Battle Squadron article (emphasis on gameplay, reception, and audio references)
extraction_notes: Limited audio documentation available in source. Wikipedia review references 'effective sound and a long running music track containing the right amount of droning bass' and 'rapid-fire animation, coupled with effective sound,' but no specific tempo, key, chord progression, or detailed SFX data per area is documented. Composer Ron Klaren identified from Wikipedia external links.
